title: Acinodendron acalephoides
taxonomy: Acinodendron acalephoides is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Acinodendron, which is part of the larger plant family Melastomataceae. The family Melastomataceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is composed of approximately 170 genera and 5,000 species. Acinodendron acalephoides is a type of epiphytic or terrestrial plant.
